assertions.assertion: Output includes a health check class implementing IHealthCheck that tests the discovery endpoint by finding and invoking the IdentityServerConstants.EndpointNames.Discovery handler
assertions.rationale: A general LLM would likely suggest HTTP-based health checks hitting /.well-known/openid-configuration, not the internal endpoint handler approach.

assertions.assertion: Output includes a health check class implementing IHealthCheck that tests the JWKS endpoint by finding and invoking the IdentityServerConstants.EndpointNames.Jwks handler
assertions.rationale: Without skill context, an LLM would not know the internal IEndpointHandler approach for JWKS health checks.

assertions.assertion: Output registers the health checks using builder.Services.AddHealthChecks() and maps the health endpoint with app.MapHealthChecks()
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core health check registration is general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Output injects IEnumerable<Hosting.Endpoint> and IHttpContextAccessor into the health check classes
assertions.rationale: The specific Hosting.Endpoint collection injection pattern is Duende-specific and not general knowledge.
